Hi, I'm
Arif Mansuri

Motivated D.Pharm graduate with hands-on expertise in pharmaceutical billing, inventory management, and digital marketing. Bridging clinical pharmacy practice and modern technology.

PCI Internship Standard

Overview

Career Objective

Patient Centric

Committed to ethical care and safe drug dispensing.

Detail Oriented

Accurate billing, stock entry & discount management.

Marketing Savvy

Grew brands online with direct messaging campaigns.

Fast Learner

Constantly upgrading clinical & technical knowledge.

Fusing Pharmaceutical Expertise with Modern Retail Operations & Digital Outreach

As a detailed-oriented Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharm) graduate from KDK College of Pharmacy & Research Institute, Nagpur, I stand at the intersection of medical science, retail operations, and digital communication.

My hands-on experience in billing systems, prescription validation, and customer outreach equips me to drive value for progressive healthcare organizations. I am eager to contribute my energy to a pharmacy or healthcare provider focused on outstanding clinical delivery.

Marg Billing Software
Schedule H/H1 Drug Rules
Drug Interaction Awareness
Vibe Coding & IT Skills
Explore My Skills
Timeline

Academic Background

Diploma in Pharmacy (D.Pharm)

KDK College of Pharmacy & Research Institute
Class of 2026

Completed thorough theoretical and practical education in Nagpur, Maharashtra. Studied critical pharmaceutical domains including Pharmacology, Pharmaceutics, Pharmacognosy, and Biochemistry with distinction-level focus.

Secondary School Certificate (SSC)

Maharashtra State Board
Completed

Successfully completed secondary high-school board education with a solid academic foundation in science, mathematics, and communication.

Proficiencies

Core Skills Matrix

Clinical & Dispensing

Drug Dispensing & Verification 95%
Schedule H & H1 Drug Laws 90%

Real-World Practice

Practical Experience

Pharmacy Intern

Laxmi Medical
10 Feb 2026 – 10 Apr 2026
Roles: Pharmacy Assistant | Pharmacist Trainee | Retail Pharmacist

Dispensed medicines accurately as per doctor's prescription

Explained medicine dosage, usage, and side effects to patients

Checked for drug interactions before dispensing

Maintained medicine stock, inventory, and purchase/sale records

Handled prescription verification and OTC medicine queries

Assisted in billing and daily record documentation

Milestones

Achievements & Certifications

Class Monitor — Golden Jubilee Batch

Elected as Class Monitor during college's prestigious Golden Jubilee celebration, demonstrating leadership and peer trust.

Cricket Championship Winner — 2025

Won 1st place in Inter-College Cricket Tournament 2025, showcasing teamwork, discipline, and competitive spirit.

Pharmacy Internship Completion Certificate

Received certificate for 2-month internship at Laxmi Medical covering dispensing, patient counselling, and stock management.

Digital Marketing — Product Campaign Achievement

Successfully planned and executed DM campaigns for clothing brand products across social media platforms.

Academic Distinction — 12th Science

Scored 80% in Higher Secondary Science stream, demonstrating strong academic foundation for pharmacy studies.
